title: ravneetkaur2094/Hybrid-deep-learning-model-for-waste-classification: Hybrid Transfer Learning with ResNet50-ELM for Waste Image Classification (v1.0)
author: ravneetkaur2094
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This release includes the core model architecture for the ResNet50-ELM hybrid framework, including ResNet50 feature extraction, subsequent dense layers, and ELM-based classification. Preprocessing steps and initial setup for compilation are provided. Various performance metrics such as accuracy, precision, recall, F1 score, and training time are also computed. Future release will expand on XAI modules (LIME, Grad-CAM).
steps_raw: This release includes the core model architecture for the ResNet50-ELM hybrid framework, including ResNet50 feature extraction, subsequent dense layers, and ELM-based classification. Preprocessing steps and initial setup for compilation are provided. Various performance metrics such as accuracy, precision, recall, F1 score, and training time are also computed. Future release will expand on XAI modules (LIME, Grad-CAM).
